title: TripCurator Itinerary
description: Structured output contract between Claude API and the frontend. The AI must return this exact schema.

destination.description: Primary city or region. E.g., 'Lourmarin, Provence'

trip_title.description: Editorial title. E.g., 'Five Days in the Luberon: Eating Like a Local'

trip_narrative.description: 2-3 sentence overview of the trip's soul — what makes this itinerary special. Written in TASTE.md voice.

base_location.description: Where the traveler is staying, if a single base. E.g., 'Le Moulin de Lourmarin'

companion_type.description: Inferred from user briefing. Drives Companion Filter.

detected_persona.description: Persona archetype detected from user briefing language.

traveler_profile.description: Summary of what the AI understood from the briefing. Shown to user for confirmation.

briefing_summary.description: One-paragraph restatement of what the user asked for, to confirm understanding.

date_label.description: Relative or absolute. E.g., 'Day 1' or 'Monday, Jan 6'

day_title.description: Editorial title for the day. E.g., 'The Lourmarin Slow Morning'

day_narrative.description: 1-2 sentence editorial framing of the day's rhythm.

morning_ritual.description: The slow morning coffee/breakfast spot. Always present per TASTE.md.

blocks.description: The day's activities, following the 1-1-1 Rule. Max 3 structured blocks + buffer.

block_type.description: Per TASTE.md 1-1-1 Rule. happy_accident = buffer time.

transition_note.description: How to get from the previous block. E.g., '15-min walk through the old town' or 'take the D943, 20 min drive'

practical_notes.description: Logistics that apply to the whole trip.

getting_around.description: Best transport mode. E.g., 'Car essential in Provence, parking is easy outside July-August.'

booking_ahead.description: What to reserve in advance. E.g., ['Dinner at Chez Bruno — book 2 weeks ahead', 'Wine tasting at Domaine de la Citadelle — email in advance']

local_tips.description: Insider knowledge. E.g., ['Shops close 12-2 for lunch', 'Markets are morning-only, arrive before 10']

name.description: Place name as it would appear locally.

neighborhood.description: Neighborhood or area. E.g., 'Príncipe Real' or 'Vieux Village, Lourmarin'

soul_factor.description: Per TASTE.md: Why does this place matter? History, chef, technique, story. 2-3 sentences, opinionated.

grit_warning.description: Per TASTE.md: What to expect. E.g., 'Cash only. No English menu. The owner may or may not acknowledge you.'

local_order.description: What to order, in local language with translation. E.g., 'Daube provençale (Provençal beef stew, slow-cooked in red wine)'

the_anchor.description: Contextual link. E.g., 'Walk here from the Friday market — 5 minutes through the plane trees.'

estimated_budget_per_person.description: Range in local currency. E.g., '€25-40' or 'Free'

coordinates.description: For map rendering. Will be validated/overridden by Google Places.

google_places_status.description: Set by backend after Google Places validation pass.

google_places_data.description: Enrichment data from Google Places API. Populated by backend, not by AI.
